codeExamples.python:
import requests

base_url = 'http://localhost:3010'
path = '/clients'
url = f'{base_url}{path}'

response = requests.get(
    url,
    headers={
        'x-api-key': '164f06577e3ec0f2f5aa51d36f0c651d179d04572e5ea2278c77eecc518d0abb'
    }
)
data = response.json()
print(data)
